title: God‘s Ears (First Draft)
content:
God‘s Ears (First Draft)

Distant chatter. Clinking and clanking of plates. Three friends sit around the dinner table, cocktails in front of them, awaiting dinner. One guys is in front of the stove tending to the awaited food, and another guy sits by himself at the bar top.

Fade in:

Hunter
From your mouth to God’s ears. (Referring to Mark)

Dan
No! I don’t want God to hear that stupid shit.

Mark
why cause you think he might actually listen?

Dan
who knows. I just don’t want you as our representative to heaven. Like if someone is up there listening, the last thing we need is HIS phone’s tapped.

Hunter
or his search history explored.

Chris
If anything, let’s turn that around.

All
huh?

Chris
from God’s mouth to his ears (gestures to Mark)

Dan
why him again?

Chris
context: From document: God‘s Ears (First Draft) — chunk 1 (chunk 1/3)
